headline: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) closed at $27.45 in the latest trading session, marking a +1.32% move from the prior day.

headline: NFL approves sale of 3.5% of Las Vegas Raiders at over $11 billion valuation
summary: The National Football League has approved the sale of 7% of the Las Vegas Raiders at a valuation of more than $11 billion.

headline: Why Losing the Warner Bros. Deal May Be the Best Outcome for Netflix Stock
summary: Since losing the Warner Bros. deal, markets are pushing up NFLX stock, and analysts are bullish. See why focusing on organic growth may be Netflix's best path forward.

headline: 'Project Hail Mary' is the box office proof point Amazon MGM has been waiting for
summary: Amazon and MGM promised to spend around $1 billion each year on theatrical releases, a figure that would fund between 12 and 15 films annually.
